title: query input
description: Input schema for the query tool.

id.description: Flow ID or macro name. Required for flow, messages, and macro resources.

fuzz_id.description: Fuzz job ID. Required for fuzz_results resource.

filter.description: Filter options for flows, fuzz_jobs, and fuzz_results resources.

protocol.description: Protocol filter (e.g. HTTP/1.x, HTTPS, WebSocket, HTTP/2, gRPC, gRPC-Web, TCP).

scheme.description: URL scheme / transport filter for flows (e.g. https, http, wss, ws, tcp).

conn_id.description: Connection ID filter for flows (exact match).

host.description: Host filter for flows (matches server_addr or request URL host).

direction.description: Message direction filter for messages resource (send or receive).

blocked_by.description: Filter sessions by blocked_by value (e.g. target_scope, intercept_drop).

state.description: Session lifecycle state filter (active, complete, error).

technology.description: Technology name filter for flows (case-insensitive substring match, e.g. nginx, wordpress).

status.description: Fuzz job status filter (e.g. running, completed).

fields.description: List of field names to include in the response (fuzz_jobs, fuzz_results).

sort_by.description: Field to sort results by. Flows: timestamp, duration_ms. Fuzz results: index_num, status_code, duration_ms, response_length.

limit.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 50, max 1000).

offset.description: Number of items to skip for pagination.
